horizontal_era_thesis: Horizontal eras only rescue young basins where horizontals dominate the well count. Williston confirms (46 percent dark, horizontals are the dominant era). Anadarko refutes (91 percent dark, horizontals are 8 percent of the well count).
architecture_thesis: Dark data is a regulator publishing choice, not a continuum. North Dakota chose a shapefile, Oklahoma a CSV, Pennsylvania a flag column, Kansas a survey, Texas kept the mainframe.
